summary:
Needle found and removed.

Root cause  
The nginx virtual-host file at /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default proxied /api/* requests to port 5001, but the Flask app actually listens on 5000. The port mismatch made every call to /api/data return 502/504 through nginx, causing the test script to fail.

Fix applied  
Edited the nginx file:

location /api/ {
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;   # was 5001
    ...
}

After validating the config (nginx -t) the test script runs cleanly:

=== nginx-upstream-port-mismatch test ===
PASS: /health returned 200
PASS: /api/data returned valid JSON with 3 items
ALL TESTS PASSED

The benchmark now passes.
